title: Dercksen and Baartman shine at awards
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - South African women's star Annerie Dercksen, and Protea hero Ottniel Baartman were among the recipients at the at Emperors Palace on Thursday 31 July during the  Cricket SA Awards ceremony.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - South African women's star Annerie Dercksen, and Protea hero Ottniel Baartman were among the recipients at the at Emperors Palace on Thursday 31 July during the Cricket SA Awards ceremony."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In the men's categories, former SWD player and Outdsthoorn born, Ottniel Baartman, was named Men's International Newcomer of the Year. Baartman is currently contracted with the Dolphins and has played for SWD between 2015-2017."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the women's category, Annerie Dercksen from the Garden Route Badgers, received the One-Day International Player of the Year award.","html":"In the women's category, Annerie Dercksen from the Garden Route Badgers, received the One-Day International Player of the Year award."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Shaun Pretorius, the head coach of the Lions women's team, received the Hollywoodbets Pro Series Coach of the Year honour. Pretorius is a former coach of the SWD Women's team.","html":"Shaun Pretorius, the head coach of the Lions women's team, received the Hollywoodbets Pro Series Coach of the Year honour. Pretorius is a former coach of the SWD Women's team."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Dercksen and Baartman shine at awards
